case_title: SERGIO LAINEZ et al VS. LEONA T. FONG AS TRUSTEE OF THE BERNARD AND LEONA et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-22-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF SERGIO LAINEZ'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT FONG, LEONA T FONG, EVELYN

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS SERGIO LAINEZ, MAGALY SILVA, PRISCILLA SILVA, MAGALY ABIGAIL SILVA BY AND THROUGH HER GUARDIAN, SERGIO ABRAHAM SILVA, BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR DEFENDANT TO PLEAD FACTS SUPPORTING EACH DEFENSE. DEFENDANT HAS 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, COURT REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998
